name: Brain Server
description: Local semantic-memory + knowledge-graph plugin. Static (model2vec) embeddings, SQLite + sqlite-vec, per-domain knowledge graphs with cross-domain fallback. Deterministic auto-recall over loopback HTTP to the Rust brain-server. Zero decision/embedding tokens.

baseUrl.description: Loopback URL of the Rust brain-server.

authToken.description: Optional bearer token. Must match BRAIN_TOKEN on the server (v1.1.0+).

agents.description: Per-agent opt-in allowlist (agent ids). Empty = disabled until at least one agent is listed.

allowedChatTypes.description: Chat types permitted for recall. Default: direct + explicit. group/channel excluded to prevent private-memory data leakage in shared contexts.

autoRecall.description: Deterministically inject relevant memories every turn via before_prompt_build. No LLM decides whether to recall.

autoCapture.description: Capture durable facts/decisions after a successful turn. Off by default; capture is a policy choice.

strictDomain.description: true = no cross-domain fallback; stay in the auto-routed domain.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Globally enable Brain Server recall/capture while keeping the plugin command available.

baseUrl.label: Brain Server URL
baseUrl.help: Loopback URL of the Rust brain-server process.

authToken.label: Auth Token
authToken.help: Bearer token matching BRAIN_TOKEN on the server (required once server auth ships in v1.1.0).

agents.label: Target Agents
agents.help: Explicit agent ids permitted to use memory. Least-privilege opt-in (OWASP LLM06).

allowedChatTypes.label: Allowed Chat Types
allowedChatTypes.help: direct + explicit by default. Excluding group/channel prevents private-memory leakage in shared contexts.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Deterministic per-turn recall injection. Zero decision tokens — recall is plugin code, not an LLM prediction.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Store durable facts after a successful turn. Off by default.
